Multi-country business suite · PA · US · VE · ES

A business suite
that actually scales
with you.

Management platform for SMBs across Panama, USA, Venezuela, and Spain. Multi-jurisdiction electronic invoicing, multi-branch, automations and REST API. From $24/month.

Available in English and Spanish

Support response time
Multi-jurisdiction electronic invoicing

Today 3 DGI Panama PACs in production · 2026 roadmap: SENIAT VE, Facturae ES, US state-level

You pick the PAC you want to work with. SuiteHub connects directly and handles the entire XML, CUFE and QR flow so you never have to think about regulation. Adapter layer designed to abstract any jurisdiction.

Digifact

DGI-certified PAC with a modern API

The Factory HKA

Regional leader in electronic invoicing

Factura Fácil

Panamanian PAC focused on simplicity

The SuiteHub family

Four editions. Grow without migrating.

Start with the basics today and upgrade your edition when you need to — no data migration, no relearning, no downtime. Same core, more horsepower.

Get started

Lite Edition

Small business, 1 location, up to 3 users

$24 /mo
  • Customers, products, services
  • Basic quotes and invoices
  • Up to 500 records
  • Email support
See details
The essentials

Core Edition

2 locations, 8 users, certified e-invoicing

$36 /mo
  • Everything in Lite +
  • DGI electronic invoicing
  • AR with multi-invoice receipts
  • Inventory + movements
  • Pre-built reports
See details
Most popular
Most popular

Pro Edition

Up to 5 locations, 20 users, automations

$96 /mo
  • Everything in Core +
  • Multi-branch with consolidation
  • REST API + 100K calls/month
  • Scheduled automations
  • WhatsApp Business integrated
  • SQL reports + PDF templates
See details
No limits

Enterprise Edition

Unlimited branches, 50 users included

$192 /mo
  • Everything in Pro +
  • AI-powered reports
  • Full white-label
  • Unlimited API
  • 24/7 priority support
  • Dedicated onboarding
See details

16% off when paid annually · Free setup · No long-term contracts

Specialized verticals

SuiteHub spoken in your language.

Every industry has its own jargon, flow and needs. We take SuiteHub and tune it for your specific business — ready to use from day one.

Boutique hotels

Case study

QS Express tripled their operational capacity

An auto-repair shop in La Chorrera with 20+ years of experience migrated from Excel and notebooks. In 4 weeks they were already issuing electronic invoices, booking appointments online and tracking every work order in real time.

3×
More orders/day
0
DGI rejections
4 wks
To full speed
